query: How many movies are there in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_movies FROM movies;

query: What is the average rating given by users?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(rating) AS average_rating FROM ratings;

query: How many ratings have been recorded in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_ratings FROM ratings;

query: How many unique genres are listed in the movies table?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT genres) AS unique_genres FROM movies;

query: What is the total number of tags added by users?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_tags FROM tags;

query: What is the highest rating given to any movie?
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(rating) AS highest_rating FROM ratings;

query: What is the total number of movies linked to IMDb?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_imdb_links FROM links WHERE imdbId IS NOT NULL;

query: What is the average timestamp of all ratings in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(timestamp) AS average_timestamp FROM ratings;

query: How many movies have the genre 'Comedy' in their genres column?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS comedy_movies FROM movies WHERE genres LIKE '%Comedy%';

query: What is the total number of unique users who have added tags?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) AS unique_tag_users FROM tags;

query: What is the average rating for each movie in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT m.title, AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.title;

query: Which movies have received a rating of 5.0?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.title FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE r.rating = 5.0;

query: What are the top 5 highest-rated movies based on average rating?
gold_sql: SELECT m.title, AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.title ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 5;

query: How many ratings have been given for each genre?
gold_sql: SELECT m.genres, COUNT(r.rating) AS total_ratings FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.genres;

query: Which user has rated the most movies?
gold_sql: SELECT r.userId, COUNT(r.rating) AS total_ratings FROM ratings r GROUP BY r.userId ORDER BY total_ratings DESC LIMIT 1;

query: What are the top 3 most frequently used tags?
gold_sql: SELECT t.tag, COUNT(t.tag) AS tag_count FROM tags t GROUP BY t.tag ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT 3;

query: Which movies have been tagged with the word 'classic'?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.title FROM movies m JOIN tags t ON m.movieId = t.movieId WHERE t.tag LIKE '%classic%';

query: What is the average rating for movies in the 'Comedy' genre?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(r.rating) AS average_comedy_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE m.genres LIKE '%Comedy%';

query: Which movie has the highest number of ratings?
gold_sql: SELECT m.title, COUNT(r.rating) AS total_ratings FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.title ORDER BY total_ratings DESC LIMIT 1;

query: What is the average rating for each genre in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT m.genres, AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.genres;

query: What is the average rating for each genre?
gold_sql: SELECT m.genres, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.genres

query: Which movies have been rated by all users who have rated the movie 'Toy Story (1995)'?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.title FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE r.userId IN (SELECT DISTINCT r1.userId FROM ratings r1 JOIN movies m1 ON r1.movieId = m1.movieId WHERE m1.title = 'Toy Story (1995)')

query: What are the top 5 highest-rated movies with at least 50 ratings?
gold_sql: SELECT m.title, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId GROUP BY m.movieId, m.title HAVING COUNT(r.rating) >= 50 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5

query: Which genres have no movies rated below 3?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.genres FROM movies m WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ratings r WHERE r.movieId = m.movieId AND r.rating < 3)

query: What is the most common tag for movies in the 'Comedy' genre?
gold_sql: SELECT t.tag, COUNT(t.tag) AS tag_count FROM tags t JOIN movies m ON t.movieId = m.movieId WHERE m.genres LIKE '%Comedy%' GROUP BY t.tag ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT 1

query: Which users have rated more than 100 movies?
gold_sql: SELECT r.userId, COUNT(r.movieId) AS movie_count FROM ratings r GROUP BY r.userId HAVING COUNT(r.movieId) > 100

query: List all movies that have never been rated.
gold_sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m LEFT JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE r.movieId IS NULL

query: What is the average rating for each year (based on movie titles containing the year)?
gold_sql: SELECT SUBSTR(m.title, LENGTH(m.title) - 4, 4) AS year, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE m.title LIKE '%(____)%' GROUP BY year

query: Which movies have received a rating of 5 from at least 10 different users?
gold_sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m JOIN ratings r ON m.movieId = r.movieId WHERE r.rating = 5 GROUP BY m.movieId, m.title HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.userId) >= 10

query: What is the difference in the average rating between 'Action' and 'Drama' genres?
gold_sql: SELECT ABS((SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM ratings r JOIN movies m ON r.movieId = m.movieId WHERE m.genres LIKE '%Action%') - (SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM ratings r JOIN movies m ON r.movieId = m.movieId WHERE m.genres LIKE '%Drama%')) AS rating_difference
